case_title: CHRYSTAL LEE VS. GERALDINE MACDONALD et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-12-2014 CONTINUED TO APR-23-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEE, CHRYSTAL AS TO DEFENDANT MACDONALD, GERALDINE LOPEZ, GERARDO DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-12-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-09-2013 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-18-2014

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-10-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE APR-23-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-10-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
